news_items.headline: Yanks' Fried has sore elbow, set to undergo tests
news_items.summary: Yankees ace Max Fried was pulled from Wednesday's start against the Orioles after just three innings because of soreness in his pitching elbow.

news_items.headline: Mets' Alvarez tears meniscus as IL woes continue
news_items.summary: Francisco Alvarez will undergo surgery for a meniscus tear in his right knee, with Mets manager Carlos Alvarez hoping his catcher can return in six to eight weeks.

news_items.headline: Reports: Cubs, Hendriks reach minor league deal
news_items.summary: The Cubs have agreed to a minor league contract with Liam Hendriks, giving the veteran reliever another chance to make his way back to the majors.

news_items.headline: Pirates' Skenes loses no-hit bid in 7th but gets w...
news_items.summary: Pirates ace Paul Skenes had his no-hit bid vs. the Rockies end in the seventh inning Tuesday night by Mickey Moniak's clean single.

news_items.headline: Raleigh ends drought with first hit since April 27...
news_items.summary: Cal Raleigh's hitless streak was the longest in the majors this season, and his knock in the seventh inning was his first since April 27.

news_items.headline: Dodgers lose but see Ohtani break slump with HR
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani snapped an 11-game homerless drought -- tied for his longest as a Dodger -- as part of a night in which he also singled, drew a walk and was robbed of another hit to break out of a prolonged slump Tuesday night in a loss to the Giants.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB, players' union hold first CBA talks
news_items.summary: Top officials from Major League Baseball and the MLB Players Association met Tuesday to officially open up collective bargaining talks a little more than six months before the expiration of the game's labor deal, sources told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Mets vs. Tigers: Lineups, broadcast info, and open thread, 5/13/26
news_items.summary: The Mets look to build some momentum as Christian Scott faces off against Framber Valdez, returning from suspension.

news_items.headline: From Clemente Bridge to first pitch, Pirates fans soak in tradition
news_items.summary: From the Roberto Clemente Bridge to statues outside PNC Park, Pirates fans turn the walk to the ballpark into part of game day.
